description_long: This office building features a distinctive X-shaped footprint, with four wings radiating from a central core. The exterior is clad in blue-tinted glass curtain walls, segmented by vertical and horizontal mullions that create a grid-like window pattern. The base of the building is darker, possibly stone or metal, providing a visual foundation. The roof is flat and features geometric cutouts and raised sections, suggesting rooftop mechanical areas or skylights. A prominent sign with a logo is visible at the front, indicating corporate or commercial use. The overall design is sleek and modern, with a focus on symmetry and clean lines.
description: A modern, X-shaped office building with blue glass curtain walls, a flat geometric roof, and a prominent front sign. The structure is sleek, symmetrical, and visually striking.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, prominent signage, and the curved facade of one wing.
description_view_1: Angled view highlighting the X-shaped layout and the geometric features of the flat roof.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the symmetry of the building and the continuous glass facade across all wings.
description_view_3: Side angle emphasizing the intersection of the wings and the rooftop's raised sections.
attribute_window_pattern: Regular, grid-like arrangement of rectangular windows spanning all floors, separated by vertical and horizontal mullions.
